result.reason: Feature request to import MobaXTerm sessions from .moba files.
result.approach: Investigate MobaXTerm's .moba file format and implement a new deserializer and importer to convert MobaXTerm sessions into mRemoteNG's connection tree model. This will likely involve creating new deserializer and importer classes, integrating them into the existing import UI, and adding corresponding unit tests.
